channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Ukraine set to get its own 'Starlink' satellite constellation with SpaceX starting in 2027 as $1bn project powers on despite CEO death
item.description: Ukraine’s Stetman plans a 360-satellite constellation by 2027, using SpaceX launches and European partnerships despite leadership changes.

item.title: Quote of the day by Steve Jobs: 'I'm willing to go thermonuclear war on this' — giving a bitter rival both barrels
item.description: The late Apple co-founder was furious with Google's work developing Android, claiming it was a stolen product

item.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‘silencing an entire generation’
item.description: Last year, Sam Altman invited author Dave Eggers to give a talk to around 200 OpenAI staffers. The man has written countless novels, screenplays, pieces of journalism, started McSweeney's, and founded multiple schools and nonprofits that support writers and the arts more broadly. So one might expect he'd roll into the company's offices and offer […]...
